problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Phytoremediation. Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
